Request a Personalized Demo

Help Us Build More
Appreciative Workplaces

WorkKudo exists to help people feel valued at work. Join us and help shape the future of workplace recognition.

💛

Why We Exist

We believe appreciation has the power to transform workplace experiences. Our mission is to help organizations create cultures where employees feel recognized, connected, and valued every single day.

Life at WorkKudo

💻Product Brainstorm
🎨Design Workshop
🌍Remote Sessions
🤝Team Gathering
⚙️Engineering Sprint
🎉Company Celebration

Our Values

💛

People First

We build products that put people at the center of every decision.

🤝

Collaboration

Great ideas emerge when talented people work together openly.

🚀

Ownership

Everyone has the opportunity to make a meaningful impact.

🌱

Growth

Continuous learning is deeply embedded in our culture.

✨

Appreciation

Recognition starts from within — we celebrate our own team.

🌎

Inclusion

Everyone deserves a genuine sense of belonging here.

Benefits & Perks

🏠
Flexible Work

Remote and hybrid-friendly environment.

📚
Learning Opportunities

Support for personal and professional growth.

🎯
Meaningful Impact

Build products that improve workplace experiences.

🛠️
Modern Tools

Work with high-quality tools and technologies.

👥
Collaborative Team

Join people who care deeply about what they build.

🔬
Growth Mindset

Experiment, learn, and improve continuously.

01
📝
Apply

02

Connect

03

04

Join WorkKudo

Start making an impact from day one.
